name: Megan Cloud - The Mortgage Unicorn
description_short: Megan Cloud is a Sr. VP Branch Manager and loan officer at V.I.P. Mortgage in San Antonio, TX, offering mortgage services including home purchases and refinances across multiple states.
description_long:
Megan Cloud operates as a Senior Vice President and Branch Manager at V.I.P. Mortgage, based in San Antonio, Texas. She holds NMLS certification #774331 and is licensed to originate mortgages across eight states: Arizona, Arkansas, Illinois, Louisiana, Michigan, New Mexico, Tennessee, and Texas. The business operates under the brand "The Cloud Team" and markets itself as "The Mortgage Unicorn," emphasizing personalized service and accessibility.

The company offers both home purchase mortgages and refinance loans. Based on client testimonials, they work with first-time homebuyers, families with tight closing timelines, and existing homeowners seeking better refinance terms. Services appear to include loan origination, pre-approval processing, and closing coordination. The team includes multiple loan officers (testimonials mention "Megan and her awesome crew" and "Megan and Dawn"), suggesting a small but functional branch operation.

What distinguishes this operation is the emphasis on communication and relationship-building. Multiple testimonials specifically praise proactive outreach to real estate professionals, after-hours availability, detailed explanations of loan processes, and keeping all parties informed throughout closing. The company actively courts real estate agents and brokers, with testimonials from listing agents noting rare proactive communication from the lender's side. The personal branding around Megan Cloud as an individual loan officer (rather than corporate marketing) is central to their positioning.

However, this is a local to regional mortgage lender with a single identifiable office location. There is no information about competitive rates, specific loan products, origination fees, approval timelines, or how they compare to national lenders. The reviews are entirely positive with no critical feedback, which may reflect a curated testimonial section rather than comprehensive third-party validation. As with any local mortgage broker, borrowers should compare rates and terms across multiple lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed across 8 states (AZ, AR, IL, LA, MI, NM, TN, TX) for geographic flexibility
Dedicated team approach with named loan officers (Megan and team members like Dawn) for relationship continuity
Proactive communication with real estate professionals and agents, not just borrowers
Handles both purchase mortgages and refinances based on demonstrated client experience
Rapid closing capability (client testimonial mentions completing process despite short closing period)
After-hours availability and responsiveness noted by multiple clients
Real estate professional endorsements from listing brokers and realtors
cons: Only one identifiable physical office location (San Antonio) limits in-person accessibility for out-of-area borrowers
No published information about interest rates, fees, loan programs, or how terms compare to competitors
Testimonials appear to be cherry-picked with no negative reviews or balanced third-party ratings visible
Limited transparency about specific loan products offered (FHA, VA, jumbo, portfolio loans, etc.)
No stated timeline guarantees or service level agreements mentioned on website
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Texas or the 7 other licensed states seeking personalized guidance
Homeowners looking to refinance with a lender who communicates proactively with real estate professionals
Real estate agents and brokers who need a lender partner with responsive service and agent coordination
Borrowers with time-sensitive closings who value accelerated processing and after-hours support
diagnosis: Megan Cloud / The Cloud Team is best for borrowers in Texas or the 7 other licensed states who value personalized, relationship-driven mortgage service and proactive communication. The main caveat is lack of rate/fee transparency and limited verifiable third-party validation—compare terms with 2-3 other lenders (national or local) before committing, and verify current rates and costs directly.
services: Real estate professional partnership and communication
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7010 W Loop 1604 N Suite 107, San Antonio, TX 78254
